mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real GDP directly expands corporate earnings expectations, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in GDP growth periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate below 8 percent signals labor market normalization, reducing recession risk premiums and lifting equity valuations over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day forward returns remain negative or flat when UNRATE drops below 8 percent, or the signal's predictive power vanishes in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in housing starts and consumer credit outstanding indicate synchronized household sector expansion, which amplifies aggregate demand and pushes S&P 500 returns higher over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive returns when both series rise, or the interaction term shows zero statistical significance in a multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Rising short-term policy rates compress equity risk premiums by increasing the discount rate, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with inflation above target
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive or neutral despite simultaneous rate hikes and high inflation, or the negative correlation breaks down in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production growth confirms strengthening manufacturing demand, which translates into higher corporate revenues and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Industrial production accelerates but equity returns decline, or the signal's hit rate drops below 50% in rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls reinforces earnings visibility, systematically lifting equity valuations over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns show no positive relationship with payroll growth trends, or the signal's information coefficient falls below 0.02 over extended periods.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth outpacing inflation signals healthy demand expansion without price instability, which optimally supports equity risk premiums and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative returns when real growth is positive, or the interaction effect disappears in out-of-sample validation.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate remains near zero, equity markets price in prolonged liquidity support and accommodative financial conditions, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns turn negative or statistically indistinguishable from zero when rates stay at the zero lower bound, or the signal fails in post-2015 normalization periods.
